since_last: 39% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.18%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.24% · BTC +0.37% · Gold -1.80% · Nasdaq100 -1.11%. 39% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.18%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.18%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.85%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +12.76%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +12.76%, TTD +3.48%, INTU +3.35%, SNOW +2.97%, WDAY +2.64%. Laggards: APP -8.45%, ARM -6.47%, MRVL -5.47%, MU -4.24%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.68% at $139.96
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
